case_title: SF TAX COLLECTOR - INVESTIGATIONS UNIT VS. TEWODROS TENKER WOLDEMARIAN

docket_entries.description: MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY TEWODROS TENKER WOLDEMARIAN IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY CHARLES SMITH--INVESTIGATOR--SF TAX COLLECTOR. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHAEL MAU. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
